data.title: Volkswagen Executive Deported From China After Positive Cannabis Test
Lockheed Martin Raises Annual EPS Guidance But Struggles With Sales; Stock Slips
data.description: LMT's Q3 results were mixed, with net sales missing consensus but adjusted EPS beating it. The company also raised its FY24 EPS outlook.

data.title: If You Invested $1000 In This Stock 5 Years Ago, You Would Have $3,300 Today
$100 Invested In Watsco 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
Donald Trump's Election Odds Surge To 64% On Polymarket, 60% On Kalshi And Favorite In All Swing States
data.description: Trump's odds of winning the presidential election have surged to 60% on prediction markets Polymarket and Kalshi, despite recent event cancellations and health rumors.
